archetype_description: Needs to be sure before acting. Driven by proof, data, and guarantees.
data_note: Only 1 entries with this archetype assigned. Profiler has not run on most entries — scores will improve as Lead Psychology Profiler processes more leads.

what_they_focus_on.point: What type of guests will the property attract? — specifically wants healthcare/NHS workers
What happens with council tax? — concerned about transition period premium
Mortgage options: holiday let vs BTL company vs clearing balance — unclear on best path
I'll need to speak to my mortgage broker about this
Away mid-June to end of July — not a decision period

objections_they_raise.objection: What type of guests will the property attract? — specifically wants healthcare/NHS workers
What happens with council tax? — concerned about transition period premium
Mortgage options: holiday let vs BTL company vs clearing balance — unclear on best path
I'll need to speak to my mortgage broker about this
Away mid-June to end of July — not a decision period

what_moves_them.point: Chester demand drivers (hospital workers, racecourse, 400+ events)
Monthly statements and Slack communication model
Income figure vs current lodger situation

language_to_mirror.phrase: consistent passive income with minimal hassle
not interested in building a portfolio
prefer to clear the mortgage for maximum flexibility and simplicity
NHS physio — building a private clinic on the side
getting the right type of guests

meeting_guidance.opening_approach: Lead with evidence, not enthusiasm. Have case studies and real figures ready before presenting income.
meeting_guidance.what_to_lead_with: Proof: 'Here's what a similar property in your area actually earned last month.'
meeting_guidance.what_to_avoid: Vague reassurance ('you'll do really well'). Certainty-seekers need specific numbers and documented track records.
meeting_guidance.close_approach: Give them time to verify. Set a clear next-step that involves a specific piece of evidence they need.
meeting_guidance.offer_framing: Only offer after ALL open questions are answered. A certainty-seeker will not sign while anything is uncertain.

delay_signal_pattern: Insufficient data — fewer than 5 entries with this archetype. Check again after profiler has processed more leads.
green_light_pattern: Insufficient data — fewer than 5 entries with this archetype. Check again after profiler has processed more leads.
